allow: Bash(python3-c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''/Users/mariagrandury/Projects/mariagrandury/mariagrandury.github.io/node_modules/@iconify/json/json/mdi.json''\)\); print\(data.get\(''info'', {}\).get\(''version'',''?''\)\); icons=[k for k in data[''icons''].keys\(\) if ''x'' in k.lower\(\) and \(''brand'' in k.lower\(\) or ''twitter'' in k.lower\(\) or k==''x''\)]; print\(''\\n''.join\(icons\)\)")
